system.description: Whenever a character uses his sense of hearing, he is using this skill. With it he may be able to hear noises that in normal circumstances might pass unnoticed: noting how to pronounce someone's name in the middle of a tavern fight, perceiving sounds however soft they are, listening to a conversation through a closed door, or even hearing those noises you might otherwise have paid no attention to — the sound of footsteps approaching while you sleep. This skill is frequently rolled in opposition to a Stealth roll of a character who wishes to move in silence.
